addGameType((string,address,address,addr.notice: addGameType deploys a new dispute game and links it to the DisputeGameFactory. The inputted _gameConfigs must be added in ascending GameType order.

chainIdToBatchInboxAddress(uint256).notice: Maps an L2 chain ID to an L1 batch inbox address as defined by the standard configuration's convention. This convention is `versionByte || keccak256(bytes32(chainId))[:19]`, where || denotes concatenation`, versionByte is 0x00, and chainId is a uint256. https://specs.optimism.io/protocol/configurability.html#consensus-parameters

isRC().notice: Whether this is a release candidate.

l1ContractsRelease().notice: Returns the release string. Appends "-rc" if this is a release candidate.

protocolVersions().notice: Address of the ProtocolVersions contract shared by all chains.

superchainConfig().notice: Address of the SuperchainConfig contract shared by all chains.

superchainProxyAdmin().notice: Address of the SuperchainProxyAdmin contract shared by all chains.

upgrade((address,address,bytes32)[]).notice: Upgrades a set of chains to the latest implementation contracts

upgradeController().notice: The address of the upgrade controller.

Deployed(uint256,address,bytes).notice: Emitted when a new OP Stack chain is deployed.

Upgraded(uint256,address,address).notice: Emitted when a chain is upgraded

AddressHasNoCode(address).notice: Throw when a contract address has no code.

AddressNotFound(address).notice: Thrown when an address is the zero address.

AlreadyReleased().notice: Thrown when a release version is already set.

BytesArrayTooLong().notice: Thrown when converting a bytes array to a uint256 and the bytes array is too long.

EmptyInitcode().notice: Thrown when parsing a blueprint preamble and the resulting initcode is empty.

IdentityPrecompileCallFailed().notice: Thrown when call to the identity precompile fails.

InvalidChainId().notice: Thrown when an invalid `l2ChainId` is provided to `deploy`.

InvalidGameConfigs().notice: Thrown when game configs passed to addGameType are invalid.

InvalidRoleAddress(string).notice: Thrown when a role's address is not valid.

InvalidStartingAnchorRoot().notice: Thrown when the starting anchor root is not provided.

LatestReleaseNotSet().notice: Thrown when the latest release is not set upon initialization.

NotABlueprint().notice: Thrown when parsing a blueprint preamble and the bytecode does not contain the expected prefix bytes.

OnlyDelegatecall().notice: Thrown when certain methods are called outside of a DELEGATECALL.

OnlyUpgradeController().notice: Thrown when an address other than the upgrade controller calls the setRC function.

PrestateNotSet().notice: Thrown when a prestate is not set for a game.

ReservedBitsSet().notice: Thrown when parsing a blueprint preamble and the reserved bits are set.

SuperchainConfigMismatch(address).notice: Thrown when the SuperchainConfig of the chain does not match the SuperchainConfig of this OPCM.

SuperchainProxyAdminMismatch().notice: Thrown when the SuperchainProxyAdmin does not match the SuperchainConfig's admin.

UnexpectedPreambleData(bytes).notice: Thrown when parsing a blueprint preamble and the preamble data is not empty. We do not use the preamble data, so it's expected to be empty.

UnsupportedERCVersion(uint8).notice: Thrown during deployment if the ERC version is not supported.
